Source: Power Pages Documentation
URL: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/power-pages/
Fetched: 2026-03-22

# Power Pages Documentation

Page last updated (ms.date): 2025-06-27
Document last updated: 2025-06-28

## Key Capabilities
- External-facing websites with Dataverse
- AI copilot features: form generation, text generation, agent integration
- Design studio, templates, Visual Studio Code CLI
- Liquid templates, Web API, code components

## Getting Started
- What is Power Pages
- Power Pages capabilities
- Create and manage sites
- Security overview and architecture white papers

## Tutorials
- Design home page
- Set up brand kit
- Create page with list
- Create page with simple form
- Configure site authentication

## AI and Copilot
- AI-powered and Copilot features overview
- Create AI-generated form using Copilot
- Add AI-generated text using Copilot
- Enable agent in your site
- Force Bing webmaster to index your site

## Design and Build
- Use the new design studio
- Pages workspace
- Styling workspace
- Templates
- Portal Management app
- Visual Studio Code and Power Platform CLI
- Plan your project

## Connect to Dataverse
- Use data workspace
- Add lists, basic forms, multistep forms
- Table permissions

## Customize and Extend
- Liquid, Web templates, Web API, Code components
- Power Automate cloud flows integration
- Advanced configuration

## Security
- Authentication configuration
- Web roles
- Table permissions
- Architecture and security white papers

## Go Live
- Go live checklist
- Assign licensing
- ALM overview

## Administration
- Portals admin center
- Consumption reports
- Diagnostics and troubleshooting
- Maintain and update
